report.summary: EOD v14 cycle-close (Mar 16): Quiet cycle — no new commits in last 3h. PUBLISH_QUEUE grew to 3 items (intent-based-dex + restaking-avs added, smart-wallets still missing page.tsx). Build Bus-errors locally (VM OOM, non-blocking on Vercel via ignoreBuildErrors). TS errors static at 40 (structured-data.examples.ts). Rate limiter 0/6 — 10th consecutive cycle flagged, FOMC T-2. git index.lock persists. 103/361 published slugs missing page.tsx (~28.5%).

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: No new commits since last cycle — no new pages or build fixes to verify this cycle.

PUBLISH_QUEUE: 3 items — /learn/smart-wallets-guide-2026 (MISSING page.tsx — persistent blocker), /learn/intent-based-dex-trading-guide (page.tsx present ✓), /learn/restaking-avs-ecosystem-guide-2026 (page.tsx present ✓). Queue grew from 2→3 via build-v12.

PUBLISHED_PAGES: 361 slugs extracted. 103 slugs (~28.5%) missing page.tsx — returning 404. Concentrated in /learn, /taxes, /wallets, /investing/best, /blog categories. Persistent carry-over from prior cycles.
TypeScript: 40 errors, all in src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (JSX in .ts file). Unchanged from eod-v13. Fix: rename to .tsx. Non-blocking for Vercel builds (ignoreBuildErrors: true).
Local build: Bus error (core dumped) — VM memory constraint. Not indicative of Vercel build health; ignoreBuildErrors: true + --webpack flag in build script. Vercel builds with 8GB heap.

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: /api/prices — CoinGecko /coins/markets, 60s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=60 stale-while-revalidate=120, stale cache fallback ✓
/api/fear-greed — alternative.me FNG, 600s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=600 stale-while-revalidate=1200, stale cache fallback (no hardcoded) ⚠
/api/trending — CoinGecko /search/trending, 300s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=300 stale-while-revalidate=600, stale cache fallback ⚠
/api/market-metrics — CoinGecko global + FNG aggregated, 60s TTL, Promise.allSettled, FULL hardcoded fallback ✓
/api/market-dominance — CoinGecko global, 300s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=300 stale-while-revalidate=600, FULL FALLBACK_DATA ✓
/api/defi-yields — DefiLlama via lib/defillama, HTTP cache only (no in-memory TTL), s-maxage=300, NO fallback data — returns 500 on error ⚠

PERSISTENT FLAG: checkRateLimit() from src/lib/rate-limiter.ts NOT applied to any of the 6 public API routes. 10th consecutive cycle flagged. FOMC is Wed Mar 18 (T-2) — traffic spike risk on unprotected endpoints.

sections.title: DevOps Status
items: Vercel deployment: Last deploy triggered by publish-v7 (Sui + On-Chain Analytics promotion). No new commits this cycle — no new deploy needed.
Next.js 16.1.6 with --webpack flag. ignoreBuildErrors: true. No vercel.json (default Vercel config).
Local build Bus error is VM memory constraint, not a production issue. Vercel builds run with 8GB heap allocation.
Security headers configured: X-DNS-Prefetch-Control, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy. Static assets immutable cache (31536000s).
Vercel trial ~5 days remaining (per standup-v15) — Jefe needs to add payment method before expiry.
git index.lock persists — blocking all commits. 427+ modified files stuck in working tree. This is the critical operational bottleneck.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Summary
items: QUIET CYCLE — No new commits in the last 3 hours. All activity was in prior cycles today (build-v12, publish-v7, design-v11, community-v27).

SHIPPED TODAY (prior cycles): Smart Wallets + MEV Protection guides (build-v12), Sui + On-Chain Analytics promotions (publish-v7/Day 43b), OptionsPnL chart fix + WCAG focus-visible (design-v11), social campaigns through Mar 31 + FOMC templates (community-v27).
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 3 items. smart-wallets-guide-2026 still needs page.tsx. intent-based-dex-trading + restaking-avs-ecosystem ready to promote.

NEXT CYCLE PRIORITIES: (1) Remove git index.lock + commit pending changes [P0]; (2) Wire rate limiter to 6 API routes before FOMC Wed [P0]; (3) Create smart-wallets page.tsx + promote all 3 queue items [P1]; (4) Add Vercel payment method [P0-Jefe].

🔴 [P0] Rate limiter: 0/6 public API routes protected. FOMC T-2 (Wed Mar 18). 10th consecutive cycle flagged.
🔴 [P0] Vercel trial ~5 days remaining — add payment method or service interruption risk.
🔴 [P1] smart-wallets-guide-2026 in PUBLISH_QUEUE but page.tsx MISSING — blocks promotion.
